message:
fix(freeze): resolve pre-increment and vstack expression bugs

Key fixes:

1. set_loc vstack management (opcode_emitter.zig):
   - Pop expression, store to local, push locals[N] back
   - Prevents stale expression re-evaluation after local is modified
   - Fixes: while (++i < N) producing incorrect comparison values

2. set_arg vstack management (zig_codegen_relooper.zig):
   - Push arg_shadow reference back to vstack after store
   - Fixes: stack underflow in subsequent operations after set_arg

3. inc_loc/dec_loc tracking:
   - Add last_inc_loc/last_dec_loc state fields to RelooperCodeGen
   - Flush vstack if it references the local being modified
   - Track for pre-increment pattern detection

4. .inc/.dec pattern detection:
   - Check for inc_loc N, get_loc N, inc pattern
   - Skip redundant increment when pattern detected
   - Prevents double-increment in pre-increment expressions

Test results:
- test_while_preinc.js: [0,10,20] (was [0,10,null])
- test_array_assign.js: [1,2] (was [1,null])
- Lodash tests: 68 PASS (was 65)

files.patch:
@@ -93,7 +93,13 @@ pub fn compileWasmToAot(
     option.opt_level = 0; // CRITICAL: O1+ have WAMR AOT miscompilation bugs causing hangs
     option.size_level = 3; // Large code model (required for AArch64)
     option.output_format = c.AOT_FORMAT_FILE;
-    option.enable_simd = enable_simd; // Pass through - WASM may have SIMD instructions
+    // CRITICAL: WAMR AOT has known miscompilation bugs with SIMD on ARM64.
+    // Benchmarks like mandelbrot, gaussian_blur, prime_factors produce incorrect results.
+    // However, we MUST enable SIMD if the WASM module contains SIMD instructions,
+    // otherwise compilation will fail with "SIMD is disabled but SIMD instructions are used".
+    // The workaround is to accept that AOT may produce incorrect results for SIMD-heavy code
+    // and recommend using Binary mode (which is faster anyway) or WASM interpreter mode.
+    option.enable_simd = enable_simd;
     option.enable_bulk_memory = true;
     option.enable_bulk_memory_opt = true; // Optimized bulk memory ops
     option.enable_ref_types = true;
